text: I have just moved to a house in Bridge Street.
zh: 我刚搬到布里奇街的一栋房子里。

text: Yesterday a beggar knocked at my door.
zh: 昨天一个乞丐敲了我的门。

text: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer.
zh: 他向我要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。

text: the beggar stood on his head and sang songs.
zh: 那乞丐倒立着唱起了歌。

text: He ate the food and drank the beer.
Then he put a piece of cheese in his pocket and went away.
zh: 然后他把一块奶酪放进口袋,就走了。

text: Later a neighbour told me about him.
zh: 后来一个邻居跟我说起了他的事。

text: He calls at every house in the street once a month
zh: 他每个月都会到这条街上的每户人家去一次,

text: and always asks for a meal and a glass of beer.
zh: 总是要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。
